hero.headline: Land Your Dream Job in Canada
hero.subheadline: Practical training programs designed for international students and immigrants — from data analytics to AI skills, we help you stand out in the Canadian job market.

courses.headline: Choose Your Path to Success
courses.subheadline: Each program is designed with real Canadian job market requirements in mind, taught by industry experts with 1-on-1 career coaching included.

level1.title: Data Analytics Fundamentals
level1.description: Master Power BI, Tableau, and SQL with AI integration. Perfect for beginners starting their data analytics journey in Canada.

advanced.title: Data Analytics Advanced
advanced.description: Advanced Python, PySpark, and Machine Learning for data professionals. Includes big data processing, A/B testing, and ML pipelines.

ai.title: AI Practical Training Camp
ai.description: Build enterprise GenAI applications with RAG, Fine-tuning, and AI Agents. Learn Gemini, Google Cloud Vertex AI, and Databricks.

project.title: Data Analytics Project Co-op
project.description: Applied real-world business data analysis projects. Build your portfolio with Customer Retention, Digital Marketing, Supply Chain, and Retail Analytics.

video.headline: What You'll Build
video.subheadline: Watch a real data pipeline project built by our students — the same hands-on skills you'll learn in class.

features.headline: Everything You Need to Succeed
features.subheadline: We don't just teach skills — we guide you through the entire journey from student to professional in Canada.

expert.title: Industry Expert Instructors
expert.description: All our instructors are working professionals with 5+ years in Canadian companies, bringing real-world experience to every class.

career.title: 1-on-1 Career Coaching
career.description: Dedicated career coaches help with resume optimization, interview prep, and job matching throughout your program.

network.title: Alumni Network
network.description: Join 1,500+ alumni in our exclusive community — get referrals, job leads, and mentorship from those who've been where you are.

flexible.title: Flexible Learning
flexible.description: Online live sessions with recordings. Weekend and evening batches available. Study while you work or settle in.

testimonials.headline: From Our Alumni
testimonials.subheadline: Real stories from real students who transformed their careers in Canada.

wei.quote: I landed a Data Analyst role at a Toronto fintech company within 3 months of finishing the program. The portfolio project was exactly what Canadian employers wanted to see.
wei.name: Wei Chen
wei.title: Data Analyst @ Fintech Co., Toronto

liu.quote: The AI bootcamp gave me the skills to transition from backend dev to ML engineer. My salary increased 40% and I now work fully remote with a US company.
liu.name: Yuting Liu
liu.title: ML Engineer @ Remote US Tech Co.

zhang.quote: The immigration guidance was invaluable. They helped me understand the Canadian hiring process and I received my first job offer within 6 weeks of landing.
zhang.name: David Zhang
zhang.title: Business Analyst @ E-commerce, Vancouver

cta.headline: Ready to Launch Your Canadian Career?
cta.subheadline: Join thousands of international professionals who've made Canada their home. Your journey starts with one click.
cta.note: No commitment required. Free 15-min career assessment included.

contact.headline: We're Here to Help
contact.subheadline: Have questions? Want to learn more about our programs? Reach out and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

booking.title: Book a Free Consultation
booking.description: Schedule a 15-minute call with our advisors to discuss your goals and find the right program.

wechat.title: WeChat / 微信
wechat.name: Charlene 二四 休
wechat.qrLabelZh: 扫二维码，添加我为朋友

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you fill out a form, subscribe to our newsletter, or contact us for support. This may include your name, email address, phone number, and any other information you choose to provide.

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, to communicate with you, and to develop new services. We may also use your information to send you marketing and promotional communications.

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information with third-party service providers who perform services on our behalf, such as payment processing and email delivery.

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at hello@canadacareer.ca.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using our services, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

services.title: Our Services
services.content: CanadaCareer provides career training programs, coaching services, and educational content. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue any service at any time.

payment.title: Payment Terms
payment.content: Payment is due at the time of enrollment. We accept major credit cards and other payment methods as displayed on our website. All fees are in Canadian dollars unless otherwise stated.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.content: We offer a full refund within 7 days of enrollment if you are not satisfied with the program. After 7 days, refunds are prorated based on the number of sessions attended.

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.content: All course materials, videos, and content provided are the property of CanadaCareer and are protected by copyright laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or share these materials without written permission.

footer.tagline: Empowering international talents to succeed in Canada.

about.headline: Our Story
about.intro: Founded by immigrants, for immigrants. We understand the Canadian job market because we've been through it.

mission.headline: Closing the Gap Between International Experience and Canadian Success
mission.content: When we came to Canada as international students and immigrants, we faced the same challenges you face today: foreign credentials not recognized, lack of Canadian work experience, and not knowing how to network. We built CanadaCareer to solve those problems — with practical skills, real connections, and honest guidance.

sarah.name: Sarah Liu
sarah.bio: Former HR Director at RBC. 10+ years helping newcomers land their first Canadian job.

michael.name: Michael Zhang
michael.bio: Senior Data Scientist at a Toronto fintech. Built 3 analytics curricula for newcomers.

amy.name: Amy Wang
amy.bio: ML Engineer at a US tech giant (remote). Passionate about making AI accessible.

james.name: James Chen
james.bio: Certified Canadian career counselor. Has helped 800+ immigrants with resume & interview prep.

success.headline: From Zero to Data Pro — Real Career Transformations
